message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for commonly ignored development artifacts:
- screenshots/ - development screenshots (large PNG files)
- *.bak - backup files created during editing
- api/*.bak - backup files in api directory

These patterns prevent accidental commits of temporary files
that don't belong in version control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -106,3 +106,10 @@ packages/wasm-compute/node_modules/
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+
+# Development screenshots
+screenshots/
+
+# Backup files
+*.bak
+api/*.bak
